---
title: "indicator_species_analysis"
output: html_document
---

Loading Libraries and Dataset

```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(indicspecies)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)

ps = readRDS('../Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')

meta <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps))

meta$dose_and_time <- paste(meta$dose_categorical, meta$Time_of_Collection_categorical, sep = "_")

sample_data(ps) <- sample_data(meta)

```

Rarefication of Data and Applying tax_glom

```{r}
ps_rare = ps %>%
  rarefy_even_depth(sample.size = 87521, rngseed = 123)
ps_genus = tax_glom(ps_rare, 'Genus')
ps_relab = microbiome::transform(ps_genus, 'compositional')
ps_filt = filter_taxa(ps_relab, function(x) mean(x) > 0.001, TRUE)
otu_table = data.frame(otu_table(ps_filt))
```


```{r}

set.seed(321)
indval = multipatt( t(otu_table), 
            cluster= ps_filt@sam_data$dose_and_time,
 		  control = how(nperm = 999) )

summary(indval, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Extract into table
indval_table = as.data.frame(indval$sign)
```

```{r}
phyla_to_plot = indval_table %>% 
  filter(p.value < 0.05 ) %>% 
  rownames()

df_of_taxa = prune_taxa(phyla_to_plot, ps_filt) %>% psmelt()

df_of_taxa %>% 
  ggplot(aes(dose_and_time,Abundance,fill=dose_and_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(height=0, width=0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 10, scales = 'free') + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
